{/* Top Section Container */}
{/* Header Row */}

Good morning, Alex ☀️

Here's what's happening with your business today.

May 1 – May 7, 2024
{/* Main KPI Cards (Naked) */}
} iconBg="bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30" />
} iconBg="bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/30" />
} iconBg="bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/30" />
} iconBg="bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30" />

Revenue Trend

`${val / 1000}K`} className="text-muted-foreground opacity-70" />
{/* Sales by Channel Container */}

Sales by Channel

{/* Bottom Small Cards Container */}
} iconBg="bg-amber-100" title="Low stock" subtitle="Wireless Headphones" alert="23 left in Mumbai" />
} iconBg="bg-green-100" title="Top channel" subtitle="Shopify (+23%)" subtext="vs last week" />
} iconBg="bg-blue-100" title="2 campaigns ready" subtitle="Weekend Sale" action="Review now →" />
} iconBg="bg-emerald-100" title="Estimated profit today" subtitle="$18,240" subtext="↑ 14% vs yesterday" />
{/* Right Matte Black Area */}
); } // Subcomponents function KPICard({ title, value, trend, trendUp, icon }: any) { return (

"use client"; import { PIMLeftSidebar } from "@/components/PIMLeftSidebar"; import { PIMInsightsSidebar } from "@/components/PIMInsightsSidebar"; import { Plus, Search, Edit } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; import { usePIMStore } from "@/store/pimStore"; import { useGetProducts, useCreateProduct } from "@/hooks/useProducts"; export default function PIMPage() { const router = useRouter(); // Local UI State (Zustand) const { searchQuery, setSearchQuery } = usePIMStore(); // Server State (React Query) const { data: products = [], isLoading: loading, error } = useGetProducts(); const createProductMutation = useCreateProduct(); const handleAddProduct = async () => { const newProduct = { title: "New AI Product", category: "Electronics", description: "Automatically generated test product to trigger the Outbox." }; await createProductMutation.mutateAsync(newProduct); }; return ( <> {/* Left Sidebar - Specific for PIM */} {/* Main Content Area */}
{/* Header */}

PIM & Inventory

Manage your products, variants and stock across all locations.

{/* Large KPI Cards Container */}
{/* Tabs & Table Container */}
{/* Sub Navigation Tabs */}

Products

{products.length}
{/* Table */}
{loading ? (
Loading products from backend...
) : error ? (
Error loading products: {error.message}
) : ( {products.map((product, idx) => ( router.push('/pim/product')} className="group hover:bg-black/[0.02] dark:hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors cursor-pointer" > ))}
Product Category Status Updated Actions
{product.title} {product.id}
{product.category || "N/A"} {product.status} {new Date(product.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString()}
)}
{/* Pagination Footer */}
Showing 1 to 8 of 2,450 products
...
{/* Right Matte Black Area (PIM Insights) */}
); } function PIMKPICard({ title, value, subtext, color, sparkline, stroke, iconBg, iconColor }: any) { return (

{title}

{value}

{subtext}

); }

"use client"; import { TeamsLeftSidebar } from "@/components/TeamsLeftSidebar"; import { TeamsInsightsSidebar } from "@/components/TeamsInsightsSidebar"; import { Megaphone, MoreHorizontal, ChevronRight, CheckCircle2, Circle } from "lucide-react"; import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; const kpiData = [ { label: "Campaigns Managed", value: "128", trend: "↑ 15% vs yesterday" }, { label: "Ad Spend (Today)", value: "$24,620", trend: "↑ 11% vs yesterday" }, { label: "ROAS (Today)", value: "4.32x", trend: "↑ 8% vs yesterday" }, { label: "Conversions (Today)", value: "1,842", trend: "↑ 13% vs yesterday" }, ]; const teamActivityData = [ { name: "Nova", task: "Optimizing Google Ads search campaigns", status: "In progress", time: "2 min ago", avatar: "https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=Nova" }, { name: "Atlas", task: "Adjusting bids for high-performing keywords", status: "In progress", time: "5 min ago", avatar: "https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=Atlas" }, { name: "Luna", task: "Analyzing Facebook Ads audience segments", status: "In progress", time: "7 min ago", avatar: "https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=Luna" }, { name: "Echo", task: "Generating ad creatives for A/B testing", status: "In progress", time: "9 min ago", avatar: "https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=Echo" }, ]; const tasksData = [ { text: "Optimize Google Ads campaigns", time: "Completed • 9:00 AM", done: true }, { text: "Review Meta Ads performance", time: "Completed • 9:30 AM", done: true }, { text: "Adjust budgets across channels", time: "Completed • 10:15 AM", done: true }, { text: "Create new ad creatives", time: "In progress • Due 1:00 PM", done: false }, { text: "Analyze competitor ad strategies", time: "Pending • Due 2:00 PM", done: false }, { text: "Schedule next week's campaigns", time: "Pending • Due 4:00 PM", done: false }, ]; const performanceOverviewData = [ { label: "Ad Spend", value: "$172,430", trend: "↑ 12.6% vs last week" }, { label: "ROAS", value: "4.32x", trend: "↑ 8.3% vs last week" }, { label: "CTR", value: "2.45%", trend: "↑ 6.1% vs last week" }, { label: "Conversions", value: "12,842", trend: "↑ 9.7% vs last week" }, ]; export default function TeamsPage() { return ( <> {/* Left Sidebar */} {/* Main Content Area */}
{/* Header */}

Ads Team Workspace

AI agents working to optimize your advertising performance across all platforms.

Running
{/* Top KPI Cards */}
{kpiData.map((kpi, idx) => (
{kpi.label} {kpi.value} {kpi.trend}
))}
{/* Middle Two Column Layout */}
{/* Team Activity */}

Team Activity

{teamActivityData.map((activity, i) => (
{activity.name[0]}
{activity.name}
{activity.task}
{activity.status} • {activity.time}
))}
{/* Today's Tasks */}

Today's Tasks

6 / 8 completed
{tasksData.map((task, i) => (
{task.done ? ( ) : ( )}
{task.text} {task.time}
))}
{/* Performance Overview (Bottom) */}

Performance Overview

{performanceOverviewData.map((data, idx) => (
{data.label} {data.value} {data.trend}
))}
{/* Right Matte Black Area */}
); }

import { ChevronDown, ChevronRight, TrendingUp, Truck, Clock, AlertTriangle, FileText, Plus, Calendar, Settings2, Download } from "lucide-react"; export function AnalyticsInsightsSidebar() { return (
{/* Insights */}

Insights

This Week
{[ { title: "Revenue is up by 16.6%", sub: "Compared to May 1 – May 5", icon: TrendingUp, color: "text-green-500", bg: "bg-green-500/10" }, { title: "Shipments are up by 12.4%", sub: "Compared to May 1 – May 5", icon: Truck, color: "text-blue-500", bg: "bg-blue-500/10" }, { title: "On-time delivery improved", sub: "By 3.2% compared to last week", icon: Clock, color: "text-purple-500", bg: "bg-purple-500/10" }, { title: "Return rate increased", sub: "By 0.6% compared to last week", icon: AlertTriangle, color: "text-amber-500", bg: "bg-amber-500/10" }, ].map((insight, i) => (
{insight.title} {insight.sub}
))}
{/* Top Reports */}

Top Reports

View all
{[ { name: "Sales Performance Report", val: "$1,250,430", trend: "↑ 16.6%", trendColor: "text-green-500", icon: FileText, color: "text-blue-500", bg: "bg-blue-500/10" }, { name: "Order Analytics Report", val: "4,782", trend: "↑ 14.3%", trendColor: "text-green-500", icon: FileText, color: "text-green-500", bg: "bg-green-500/10" }, { name: "Shipment Analytics Report", val: "1,248", trend: "↑ 12.4%", trendColor: "text-green-500", icon: FileText, color: "text-blue-500", bg: "bg-blue-500/10" }, { name: "Inventory Report", val: "2.4%", trend: "↓ 0.6%", trendColor: "text-red-500", icon: FileText, color: "text-amber-500", bg: "bg-amber-500/10" }, { name: "Customer Report", val: "1,856", trend: "↑ 8.7%", trendColor: "text-green-500", icon: FileText, color: "text-purple-500", bg: "bg-purple-500/10" }, ].map((report, i) => (
{report.name}
{report.val} {report.trend}
))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

); }

messages.message: 'e' is defined but never used.
'e' is defined but never used.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
